markdown:
Rough alternative balances and duties convert each route architecture into first-pass utility and cost intensity.

| Route | Family | Heating (kW) | Cooling (kW) | CAPEX (INR bn) | Utility OPEX (INR bn/y) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| eo_hydration | Liquid Hydration Train | 100977.9 | 82875.1 | 8.77 | 2.83 |
| omega_catalytic | Liquid Hydration Train | 91056.7 | 75731.8 | 8.64 | 2.56 |
| chlorohydrin | Chlorinated Hydrolysis Train | 13044.2 | 11433.3 | 9.21 | 0.39 |
